author: someone114514
name: Baseline + EMA + Adaptive Export (Non-Record)
blurb: Non-record run built on the strong Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash + Muon baseline, adding late-stage EMA and adaptive export-time pruning search. Final sliding-window roundtrip reaches 1.1725 val_bpb on 2xH100, but the artifact remains 449,881 bytes over the 16MB target.
